name: Creamy Polenta with Mushrooms
tagline: Slow-stirred polenta under garlicky seared wild mushrooms
highlight: Polenta is naturally egg-free, gluten-free comfort

hero.alt: Creamy polenta topped with seared mushrooms and parsley
hero.caption: polenta — creamy with mushrooms

healthFacts: Stone-ground polenta retains the corn germ — fiber and B vitamins intact.
Mushrooms add umami and B-vitamins, especially riboflavin.

steps.title: Bring liquid to a boil
steps.detail: In a heavy pot, bring water and salt to a boil. Slowly stream in polenta, whisking constantly to prevent lumps.
steps.tip: Stream the polenta with one hand, whisk with the other — like making a roux.

steps.title: Stir slow
steps.detail: Reduce heat to low. Stir every minute or two for 25–30 minutes until polenta is thick and pulls from the sides. Add milk halfway.
steps.tip: Quick polenta is a lie. Real polenta is a half-hour ritual.

steps.title: Sear mushrooms
steps.detail: Heat olive oil in a wide skillet over high. Sear mushrooms in a single layer 5 min undisturbed, then toss. Add garlic and thyme last 60 sec.
steps.tip: Mushrooms release water — let it cook off before adding salt.

steps.title: Finish polenta and plate
steps.detail: Beat butter and parmesan into polenta off heat. Spoon into shallow bowls, pile mushrooms on top, scatter parsley.
steps.tip: Polenta tightens as it cools — serve immediately or thin with a splash of hot stock.
